headline: Hims & Hers shares surge after Novo Nordisk drops patent infringement case over compounded weight loss drugs
summary: Novo dropped its patent-infringement case against telehealth provider Hims & Hers after the companies agreed that Hims would sell Novo's branded medicines.

raw.headline: Hims & Hers shares surge after Novo Nordisk drops patent infringement case over compounded weight loss drugs
